title: cyclobalanopsis jensenianum
intro: Cyclobalanopsis jensenianum, also known as the Jensen's chestnut oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis jensenianum include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
